creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
cool, thank you, would a diff like
diff --git a/devel/py-Faker/Makefile b/devel/py-Faker/Makefile
index 5e50878fc31c..64cb58c4320f 100644
--- a/devel/py-Faker/Makefile
+++ b/devel/py-Faker/Makefile
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 PORTNAME=      Faker
-PORTVERSION=   0.8.15
-PORTREVISION=  3
+PORTVERSION=   15.1.1
+PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    devel python
 MASTER_SITES=  CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
diff --git a/devel/py-Faker/distinfo b/devel/py-Faker/distinfo
index 1de92aa989f0..4c85558a0884 100644
--- a/devel/py-Faker/distinfo
+++ b/devel/py-Faker/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1526739807
-SHA256 (Faker-0.8.15.tar.gz) = a77a1a2223a8e0d32618878350bbd2171040f32b526ba2cddfab8864704bb370
-SIZE (Faker-0.8.15.tar.gz) = 733207
+TIMESTAMP = 1666455258
+SHA256 (Faker-15.1.1.tar.gz) = a741b77f484215c3aab2604100669657189548f440fcb2ed0f8b7ee21c385629
+SIZE (Faker-15.1.1.tar.gz) = 1600615


be good to update py-Faker to latest revision? If so, I can open a new bug for it, thank you
